chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No. S-177 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of MA-1048/2020 09.11.2020 Mr. Usman Riaz, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hanif Memon, advocate for Respondents No.2&3. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, A.A.G. = The instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution on 22.10.2019, its restoration was sought for on 04.02.2020 by filing an application u/s 151 C.P.C, it was also dismissed for non-prosecution on 24.08.2020. Now the petitioner by way of listed application has sought for restoration of the restoration application. It has filed within time and it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he being resident of Islamabad could not attend the Court timely on account of disturbance of flight schedule due to COVID-19. Learned counsel for the private respondents has opposed to grant of listed application by contending that the petitioner is intending to keep the private respondents disturb for one or other reason otherwise he has no intention to proceed with the petition on merits. Be that as it may, the reason which is advanced by learned counsel for the petitioner is appearing to be genuine therefore, the listed application is allowed. Consequently, the matter would go for hearing of MA No.146 of 2020 for restoration of main petition. Adjourned to 23.11.2020. J U D G E Ahmed/Pa,
